name: AI Architect
description: Chat with an AI (Groq) inside the level editor and let it build layouts for you from a text prompt.

groq-api-key.name: Groq API Key
groq-api-key.description: Your personal Groq API key from console.groq.com. Stored in the mod's local settings only - never uploaded anywhere by this mod.

groq-model.name: Groq Model
groq-model.description: Which Groq-hosted model to use. Example: llama-3.3-70b-versatile

max-build-objects.name: Max Objects Per Build
max-build-objects.description: Safety cap - the AI won't be allowed to place more than this many objects in one go.
